name: High Plains Uranium, Inc.
description: High Plains Uranium, Inc. was a Canadian-based exploration and development company that focused on the acquisition and advancement of uranium properties, primarily in Wyoming and Texas, United States. The company specialized in identifying and developing previously explored uranium assets to secure production potential. High Plains Uranium, Inc. was publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange before being acquired by Uranium One Inc. in 2006 for approximately US$55 million, marking a significant consolidation in the uranium sector at that time.
